title: rubus daltrii
intro: Rubus daltrii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus daltrii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an anti-cancer agent. Rubus daltrii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
